justification: The diff only updates Spring Boot version (2.2.6 -> 3.3.13) and Java version (1.8 -> 21) in pom.xml, and cleans up wildcard imports in MavenWrapperDownloader.java. It removes the junit-vintage-engine exclusion, which is appropriate for Spring Boot 3. However, there is no actual Java 21 idiomatic code usage (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) shown in the diff, and the changes are minimal beyond version bumps. The diff is coherent and focused, but lacks substantive Java 21 migration work.
